description: Input event sequence for Kotoba STT bidirectional streaming

events._comment: Step 1: Configure session after receiving transcription_session.created
Step 2: Send audio chunks (80ms recommended, max 8 seconds per event)
Step 3: Signal end of audio stream

opus.description: Self-contained Ogg/Opus blob per append event

turn_detection_options._comment: session.turn_detection accepts either false or a server VAD config object
turn_detection_options._notes: With false there is no automatic turn detection — concatenate delta events and use input_audio_buffer.committed as the done signal. With server_vad the server emits a conversation.item.input_audio_transcription.completed event at each detected turn boundary. silence_duration_ms is the trailing silence (ms) that ends a turn; it defaults to 400 but should be tuned for your application and downstream pipeline.
